MAISERSTS2-MAISER_NEIGHBORHOOD_HERO.desc:
{IfUpgraded:show:Add {CreateCount:diff()} [gold]Rapid Fire[/gold].
}Add {CreateCount:diff()} [gold]Dutiful Steed [/gold] to hand.
Until end of turn whenever [gold]Amulet[/gold] power is removed,
Add {CreateCount:diff()} [gold]Rapid Fire[/gold] to hand.
MAISERSTS2-DUTIFUL_STEED.title: Dutiful Steed
MAISERSTS2-DUTIFUL_STEED.description:
If the next card used will deal damage give it {DamageBonus:diff()} damage.
If the next card used will gain block give it {BlockBonus:diff()} block.
MAISERSTS2-RAPID_FIRE.title: Rapid Fire
MAISERSTS2-CHAOS_WIELDER.description: Spellboost: Subtract 1 energy cost of this card.
MAISERSTS2-CHAOS_WIELDER.title: Chaos Wielder
MAISERSTS2-INSIGHT.title: Insight
MAISERSTS2-MAGIC_MISSILE.title: Magic Missile
MAISERSTS2-NATERRAN_GREAT_TREE.descripti:
If any other [gold]Naterran Great Tree(s)[/gold] [gold]amulet[/gold],
remove 1 counter then draw {Cards:diff()} card.
MAISERSTS2-NATERRAN_GREAT_TREE.title: Naterran Great Tree
MAISERSTS2-WORDS_OF_JUDGEMENT.descriptio: Remove all effect on the enemy, If there is any [gold]amulet(s)[/gold] stack, recover {EnergyGain:diff()} energy.
MAISERSTS2-WORDS_OF_JUDGEMENT.title: Words of Judgement
MAISERSTS2-TRAVELERS_RESPITE.description:
Heal {HealingValue:diff()} hp.
Add {CreateCount:diff()} [gold]Naterran Great Tree[/gold] to hand
MAISERSTS2-TRAVELERS_RESPITE.title: Traveler's Respite
MAISERSTS2-VINCENT_THE_PEACEKEEPER.descr:
While in hand, whenever a card get enchanted by [gold]amulet[/gold], subtract {SubtractCost:diff()} energy of this card.
Whenever a card get enchanted by an [gold]amulet[/gold], add {CreateCount:diff()} [gold]Words of Judgement into hand.
Whenever you play skill for the 3rd times with the same name of this turn, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
MAISERSTS2-VINCENT_THE_PEACEKEEPER.title: Vincent the Peacekeeper
MAISERSTS2-RIVAYLIAN_BANDIT.description:
Enhance({EnhanceCostValue:diff()}): Deal {EnhanceDamageValue:diff()} damage to an enemy.Gain {EnhanceBlockValue:diff()} block, when this card is enchanted for the first time this turn gain additional {EnhanceBlockBonusValue:diff()} block.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to an enemy.Gain {Block:diff()} block, when this card is enchanted for the first time this turn gain additional {BlockBonus:diff()} block.
MAISERSTS2-RIVAYLIAN_BANDIT.title: Rivaylian Bandit
MAISERSTS2-RUNIE_RESOLUTE_DIVINER.descri:
If this card has been Spellboosted at least 1 time, draw a card.
Then if it's been [gold]Spellboosted[/gold] at least 4 times deal {Damage:diff()} to a random enemy.
Then if it's been [gold]Spellboosted[/gold] at least 7 times, deal {Damage:diff()} to a random enemy and heal {HealingValue:diff()} hp.
Then if it's been [gold]Spellboosted[/gold] at least 10 times, add {CreateCount:diff()} [gold]Runie, Resolue Diviners[/gold] into hand.
Spellboost: {SpellboostCount:diff()}
MAISERSTS2-RUNIE_RESOLUTE_DIVINER.title: Runie, Resolute Diviner
MAISERSTS2-ISABELLES_CONJURATION.descrip: Draw a random {Cards:diff()} attack card from your draw pile to hand.
MAISERSTS2-ISABELLES_CONJURATION.title: Isabelle's Conjuration
MAISERSTS2-TETRAS_METTLE.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:During this 2 turn|During this turn}.
Whenever you play [gold]Machina[/gold] card draw {Cards:diff()} card
MAISERSTS2-TETRAS_METTLE.title: Tetra's Mettle
MAISERSTS2-SORCERY_IN_SOLIDARITY.descrip:
Add 1 of these following card:
 -[gold]Isabelle's Conjuration[/gold]
- Tetra's Mettle
If this card has been [gold]Spellboosted[/gold] atleast 5 times, instead add both cards to hand
Spellboost: {SpellboostCount:diff()}
MAISERSTS2-SORCERY_IN_SOLIDARITY.title: Sorcery in Solidarity
